items.title: Pistons beat Cavs 103-94. One of the better games this summer, overall. Good stuff from Cavs' rookie Meleek Thomas, some notable defensive flashes from Ebuka Okorie for Detroit (seven steals!), and an Emergent Random Guy in the Pistons' Brice Williams.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Pistons beat Cavs 103-94. One of the better games this summer, overall. Good stuff from Cavs' rookie Meleek Thomas, some notable defensive flashes from Ebuka Okorie for Detroit (seven steals!), and an Emergent Random Guy in the Pistons' Brice Williams.

items.title: The passing flashes from Cavs rookie Meleek Thomas have been pretty good, but still too many moments where he gets thirsty instead of moving the ball. Still, a strong early candidate for the All-"this guy should have gone in the first round" team.
items.author: John Hollinger

items.title: The Cleveland Cavaliers signed Meleek Thomas, the 34th pick in the 2026 NBA Draft, to a four-year, $9.3 million deal, league sources told HoopsHype. Thomas gets the first three years fully guaranteed for a total of $6.4 million. Agent Sam Permut of Roc Nation finalized the deal.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Cleveland Cavaliers signed Meleek Thomas, the 34th pick in the 2026 NBA Draft, to a four-year, $9.3 million deal, league sources told HoopsHype. Thomas gets the first three years fully guaranteed for a total of $6.4 million. Agent Sam Permut of Roc Nation finalized the deal.

With the 34th pick of the NBA Draft the Cleveland Cavaliers select Meleek Thomas!

The 2026 NBA Draft is LIVE on ESPN.

items.title: I'm a big Meleek Thomas fan. He fell to the 2nd-Rd, but making it to the Celtics, who have the 10th pick tonight, seemed unrealistic. Instead, Cavs take him at No. 34.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
I'm a big Meleek Thomas fan. He fell to the 2nd-Rd, but making it to the Celtics, who have the 10th pick tonight, seemed unrealistic. Instead, Cavs take him at No. 34.

Last night, Brad Stevens noted possibly using tonight's pick to "add maybe one more person with some speed on the perimeter."

1/2

items.title: Sources: The Sacramento Kings will select Meleek Thomas with the No. 34 pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Thomas and a 2032 Cavaliers second-round pick are being traded to the Cleveland Cavaliers as part of the Alex Karaban trade.

items.title: Bulls should trade up in the second round tonight. Three targets: Bruce Thornton, Meleek Thomas, and Henri Veesaar. I'd put Isaiah Evans fourth. Bryson inherited a ton of seconds from AK's trade deadline purge. This is what they're for. Go get a third contributor from this draft.
items.author: Ricky O'Donnell
items.body_excerpt: Bulls should trade up in the second round tonight. Three targets: Bruce Thornton, Meleek Thomas, and Henri Veesaar. I'd put Isaiah Evans fourth. Bryson inherited a ton of seconds from AK's trade deadline purge. This is what they're for. Go get a third contributor from this draft.
